hooks.command: jq -r 'if .tool_input.command | test("rm -rf|dd if=|:(){ :|:& };:|git push") then {"decision": "block", "reason": "Cannot execute unsafe command. Please use another way."} else empty end'

jq -r 'if .tool_input.command | test("(^|[;|&] )git (add|stage).+[.](env|pem|key|p12|pfx)|(^|[;|&] )git (add|stage).+(service_account|credential)") then {"decision": "block", "reason": "Blocked: attempting to stage a sensitive file (.env, certificate, or credential). This file must not be committed to the repository."} else empty end'
